decisions.relationship_evidence: Introduces a novel data-driven dynamic microsimulation framework for epidemic intervention analysis and demonstrates it in a Devon COVID-19 lockdown case study.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit methodological development source for a new epidemic microsimulation framework.

decisions.relationship_evidence: The review merely reports that one included cost-utility study used microsimulation; it neither uses nor directly evaluates that method.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Not a lineage source for agent-based or individual-based modeling.
named_source_mentions: Consolidated Health Economic Evaluation Reporting Standards checklist

decisions.relationship_evidence: Proposes an agent-based epidemic model incorporating cultural orientation, planned behavior, and Bayesian representations of individual decisions.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit development of a new agent-based modeling approach for behavioral epidemiology.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses discrete-event and agent-based simulations to generate dialysis-unit contact matrices and then uses an agent-based model to predict SARS-CoV-2 transmission.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete agent-based application to transmission in a hemodialysis center.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Conducts a Monte Carlo microsimulation economic evaluation of cryptococcal-antigen testing strategies for people with HIV in Brazil.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete microsimulation application to cryptococcal-meningitis diagnosis policy.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Presents an agent-based methodology coupling individual motion, spatial aerosol transport, and Wells-Riley infection-risk calculations, then compares it with the classical well-mixed approach.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit methodological extension of agent-based aerosol-exposure modeling.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses an agent-based simulation model to assess screening throughput and cross-infection exposure during community virus testing in Wuhan.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete application to COVID-19 mass-testing operations.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses a Markov microsimulation model to compare prophylactic negative-pressure wound therapy with conventional dressings after colorectal surgery.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete microsimulation application to prevention of surgical-site infection.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Develops and runs a microsimulation comparing hospital-based opioid-use-disorder strategies, including effects on injection-related infections, hospitalization, overdose, costs, and survival.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete microsimulation application involving serious injection-related infections.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Develops and calibrates a granular agent-based simulation of COVID-19 to compare vaccine-prioritization strategies in a large US urban community.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete agent-based vaccine-policy application.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses the Covasim agent-based model with parameter calibration and validation to simulate COVID-19 spread in New York State and the UK.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete agent-based outbreak-modeling application.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses a probabilistic microsimulation to compare CPE hospital-admission screening strategies under alternative colonization-prevalence scenarios.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete microsimulation application to control of carbapenemase-producing Enterobacteriaceae.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Develops an agent-based epidemiological model calibrated to Austrian nursing homes and simulates testing, vaccination, and visitor policies.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete agent-based SARS-CoV-2 application in nursing homes.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses an agent-based simulation of engineering students to estimate how timetabling, testing, tracing, and vaccination affect SARS-CoV-2 spread.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete agent-based application to university transmission control.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Develops the scalable PanSim agent-based microsimulation framework and demonstrates its use for vaccination, quarantine, testing, and reopening strategies.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit development of a named, detailed epidemic microsimulation framework.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses a stochastic agent-based model to simulate COVID-19 outbreaks and compare the cost-effectiveness of public-health measures in China.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete agent-based intervention and economic-evaluation application.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Calibrates an agent-based epidemiological model with Austrian school cluster-tracing data and simulates combinations of prevention measures.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete agent-based application to SARS-CoV-2 control in schools.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses an agent-based model to examine nursing-home outbreak dynamics under different community prevalence, vaccination, booster, and variant assumptions.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete agent-based nursing-home transmission application.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Proposes and verifies a COVID-19 propagation simulation model based on an agent-based approach using official Ukrainian incidence data.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit proposal of an agent-based epidemic simulation model.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses a natural-history microsimulation to compare durations of hepatocellular-carcinoma surveillance after hepatitis C cure.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete microsimulation application to long-term outcomes following hepatitis C infection.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses a microsimulation program to project clinical and economic outcomes for alternative HPV post-treatment testing pathways in Canada.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete microsimulation application involving HPV-related cervical disease.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses an agent-based model to simulate SARS-CoV-2 progression and intervention scenarios supporting policy decisions in Australia and New Zealand.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete public-health application of agent-based epidemic modeling.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Develops and validates an agent-based simulation tool for COVID-19 outbreaks and infection-control measures in long-term-care facilities.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Provides a concrete agent-based simulation tool rather than only reporting a model result.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Adapts a validated microsimulation model to compare hepatitis C confirmation-testing algorithms in Georgia and Malaysia.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete microsimulation application to hepatitis C diagnosis and elimination.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Proposes a fine-grained framework and multi-agent implementation capable of simulating Lombardy's population at the single-individual level.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit methodological contribution addressing population-scale limitations of agent-based modeling.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses an agent-based model to compare reactive workplace and school vaccination with non-reactive vaccination strategies.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete agent-based COVID-19 vaccination application.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Develops, validates, and uses facility-specific agent-based models to compare corrective actions for Listeria contamination in produce packinghouses.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete agent-based application to foodborne-pathogen contamination control.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Constructs three individual-data microsimulation models to evaluate the cost utility of COVID-19 vaccines in Brazil.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete microsimulation vaccine-economic application.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Builds a spatially explicit agent-based model to investigate how host dispersal, habitat fragmentation, and transmission shape infected tick burdens.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete agent-based application to tick-borne pathogen ecology.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Develops and fits an agent-based school-transmission model to compare COVID-19 screening, vaccination, and class-closure protocols.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete agent-based application to school transmission control.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Develops and validates an individual-based microsimulation of vitamin A supplementation effects on measles- and diarrhea-associated mortality in three countries.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete individual-based application involving infectious-disease mortality.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Develops a coupled framework combining a spatial agent-based movement model with an agent-based SIR model for indoor intervention assessment.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit methodological development of a coupled agent-based infection-risk framework.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses the MISCAN microsimulation model to estimate changing harms, benefits, and efficiency across rounds of Dutch HPV screening.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete microsimulation application involving HPV screening and vaccination.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Parameterizes a validated microsimulation model with Indian data and trial results to evaluate a psychosocial HIV-prevention intervention.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete microsimulation application to HIV prevention.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses an agent-based pedestrian and transmission model to quantify airborne cross-infection risks in a COVID-19 fever clinic.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete agent-based application to nosocomial infection risk.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Proposes a scalable, risk-indexed agent-based model for simulating how mobility restrictions affect COVID-19 spread across Italy.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit proposal of a reproducible and scalable agent-based methodology.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses a decision-tree microsimulation model to compare new antibiotics with colistin for carbapenem-resistant infections.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete microsimulation application to treatment of resistant infections.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses a granular agent-based town model to project how booster delivery and testing interact under waning COVID-19 immunity.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete agent-based COVID-19 policy application.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Develops an agent-based nursing-home model and simulates testing, vaccination, hospitalization, and outbreak-duration outcomes.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete agent-based SARS-CoV-2 application.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Estimates HPV clearance patterns and notes implications for refining microsimulation models, but does not itself use or evaluate such a model.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Provides possible model inputs rather than lineage for the modeling concept.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Builds and runs an agent-based Monte Carlo model to compare four COVID-19 vaccination strategies in France and Colombia.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete agent-based vaccination application.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Builds an agent-based SARS-CoV-2 model from mobility data to estimate transmission settings and superspreading in New York City and Seattle.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete agent-based transmission application in metropolitan areas.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Develops a stakeholder-informed microsimulation of HIV transmission to compare PrEP allocation strategies in Los Angeles County.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete microsimulation application to HIV prevention and equity.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Develops, evaluates, and uses a spatially explicit agent-based influenza model to recommend combined interventions in Shenzhen.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete agent-based influenza-control application.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Proposes PaCAR, including a new large-scale agent-based epidemic simulator coupled to a reinforcement-learning policy architecture.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit methodological development of a large-scale agent-based decision framework.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Builds and uses an agent-based model alongside an SEIR model to simulate COVID-19 controls for a documented Yangzhou outbreak.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete agent-based outbreak application.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Builds a three-dimensional agent-based representation of hyperdense Hong Kong and simulates Omicron interventions.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete agent-based metropolitan COVID-19 application.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Develops a configurable agent-based digital twin and identifies a novel fine-grained model as a principal contribution.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit development of a reusable agent-based pandemic-modeling template.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Builds and validates an agent-based mobility simulation to estimate occupation-specific travel patterns and malaria exposure in Myanmar.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete agent-based application to malaria-exposure assessment.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Builds, calibrates, and applies a Covasim agent-based model to assess COVID-19 vaccination campaigns in Lombardy.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete agent-based regional vaccination application.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Proposes a novel agent-based transmission model for testing containment measures and reopening policies in closed environments.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit methodological proposal and experimental demonstration of a new model.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Develops and runs a microsimulation of HIV among Los Angeles County MSM to compare racially targeted PrEP allocation policies.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete microsimulation application to HIV prevention equity.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Develops an agent-based classroom transmission model and uses it to compare testing surveillance, quarantine, and contact-reduction measures.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete agent-based SARS-CoV-2 school application.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses Covasim alongside statistical models to estimate variant transmissibility and intervention effects in England.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete agent-based application to SARS-CoV-2 variants and restrictions.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses a metapopulation agent-based model to estimate spatial variant spread, vaccination effects, and lockdown counterfactuals in England.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete geospatial agent-based epidemic application.

decisions.relationship_evidence: This protocol states that future economic analysis will use microsimulation, but reports no completed use, evaluation, or implementation of the method.
decisions.lineage_evidence: A planned analysis is not yet a genuine application lead.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Integrates an agent-based migration model with an SIR model to simulate avian-influenza transmission under habitat-loss scenarios.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete agent-based application to avian-influenza ecology.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Proposes and validates a GIS-informed, one-to-one population agent-based model for COVID-19 risk assessment in Shanghai.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit development of an agent-based GIS simulation system.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Presents a mesoscale framework integrating an agent-based human-interaction model with respiratory-flow physics and verifies its submodels.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit methodological development and validation of a coupled agent-based framework.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Presents and validates the CALMS agent-based lifelong health and economic model and demonstrates targeted intervention experiments.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit presentation and validation of a named agent-based simulation model.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Adapts existing agent-based packinghouse models for long-term simulation and uses them to analyze persistent Listeria contamination and sanitation actions.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete agent-based food-contamination application.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Runs an individual-based microsimulation across 104 hospitals to compare four SARS-CoV-2 admission-testing approaches.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete individual-based application to detection of hospital admissions with SARS-CoV-2.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses a multiscale agent-based epidemic model to generate data for comparing statistical estimators of waning vaccine effectiveness.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete agent-based acute-viral-infection simulation supporting a vaccine-effectiveness study.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses a classroom microsimulation combining an SIR model with a random graph to compare school COVID-19 scenarios.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete microsimulation application to school transmission.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Builds open-source agent-based models representing 198 million people across 148 countries and simulates global vaccine-allocation strategies.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete large-scale agent-based COVID-19 vaccine-allocation application.

decisions.relationship_evidence: The title explicitly identifies an agent-based simulation of the COVID-19 epidemic in Russia, while the abstract frames its use for evaluating epidemic controls.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete country-level COVID-19 simulation application.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses outputs from a validated hepatitis C microsimulation to construct and compare machine-learning and regression metamodels.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete use of an HCV microsimulation, although the primary comparison concerns metamodels.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Presents a new local-scale agent-based Taenia solium model and a new non-local calibration approach, then validates transfer to other villages.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit development and validation of a new agent-based transmission model and calibration method.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Proposes an individual-based, spatially resolved agent-based framework and states that its Python implementation is publicly available as an open-source platform.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicitly provides an open-source implementation of the modeling framework.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses Markov-based microsimulation to estimate life expectancy and disability-free life expectancy by HIV status and viral suppression.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete microsimulation application to HIV-related healthy longevity.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Develops a microsimulation from MTN-020/ASPIRE data to estimate dapivirine-ring effectiveness across vaginal and anal intercourse patterns.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete microsimulation application to HIV prevention.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Benchmarks surrogate and direct machine-learning approaches for Bayesian parameter inference in stochastic agent-based models, including an infectious-disease case study.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Direct methodological evaluation of inference performance and computational limitations for stochastic agent-based models.
supported_label_variants: stochastic simulations that track autonomous agents

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses the PATAT agent-based model to simulate symptomatic and asymptomatic SARS-CoV-2 testing strategies in Zambia.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete agent-based testing-policy application.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Constructs a tuberculosis-HIV microsimulation to estimate long-term health and cost outcomes of preventive therapy in Tanzania.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete microsimulation application to tuberculosis and HIV.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses the Levers of HIV agent-based model to simulate 2,304 prevention and care scenarios for Chicago MSM.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete agent-based HIV-policy application.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Develops and runs an agent-based trial emulation to estimate effect modification of PrEP spillover effects among MSM in metropolitan Atlanta.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete agent-based HIV-prevention application.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Develops and explores the MHMSLeptoDy agent-based model to compare interventions and zoonotic Leptospira transmission risks.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete agent-based multi-host leptospirosis application.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Applies two microsimulation models to 228 HPV vaccination and cervical-screening scenarios for the Dutch population.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete microsimulation application involving HPV transmission and cervical cancer.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses the FRED agent-based platform to compare one- and two-dose influenza vaccination under alternative waning and uptake assumptions.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete agent-based influenza-vaccination application.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses thresholds previously produced by a validated microsimulation to review implementation evidence, but does not run, evaluate, or implement the model itself.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Secondary reliance on model-derived thresholds is not a relationship to the modeling concept.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses GPS-informed agent-based modeling to simulate the first SARS-CoV-2 wave and infection-control measures in Tokyo.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete agent-based urban transmission application.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Compares population and age projections from two structurally distinct HIV microsimulation models and examines how assumptions produce divergent results.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Direct comparison of microsimulation outputs, parameters, and structural assumptions.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Proposes per-agent mobility-data generation and implements a web-based agent-based simulator and configurable data generator for COVID-19 research.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicitly provides a functioning web-based simulator/data generator.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Reviews agent-based arbovirus models, identifies limited consideration of climatic and environmental factors, and recommends incorporating them.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit methodological review offering guidance on environmental inputs for agent-based arbovirus modeling.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Develops a stochastic continuous-time agent-based herd model and compares Johne's disease testing and culling strategies.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete agent-based application to livestock infection control.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Develops a microsimulation comparing heart-transplant waitlist strategies with and without hepatitis C-positive donors.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete microsimulation application involving hepatitis C infection.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses the FRED agent-based platform to simulate seasonal influenza burden under varying vaccine efficacy, uptake, and breakthrough-infection assumptions.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete agent-based influenza-vaccine application.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Modifies and applies an existing agent-based model to compare distancing and masking strategies in touristic cities.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete agent-based COVID-19 intervention application.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Analyzes the scaling behavior and output dynamics of an existing infectious-disease agent-based code and derives parameters for quantitative model comparison.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Direct evaluation of agent-based model scaling and comparability.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses and validates the EpiGraph agent-based simulator to compare COVID-19 vaccination strategies for metropolitan Madrid.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete agent-based vaccination-policy application.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Introduces an agent-based social-force model combining aerosol tracking with multiday infection dynamics and demonstrates it in an airport.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit methodological introduction of a temporally extended agent-based infection model.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Presents a new mixed agent-based compartmental framework and a new evolving-network technique for jointly modeling infections with differing prevalence.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit development and proof-of-concept demonstration of a new hybrid agent-based framework.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Develops an individual-level microsimulation state-transition model to estimate benefits of extending male HPV vaccination ages.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete individual-level microsimulation application involving HPV infection and cancer.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Develops and runs an agent-based model of wild-boar movement and African swine fever expansion under hunting scenarios.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete agent-based animal-infection application.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses microsimulation within a hepatitis B state-transition analysis to project disease reductions from newborn vaccination.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete microsimulation application to hepatitis B vaccination.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Establishes and uses a high-resolution agent-based town model to simulate simultaneous spread of two COVID-19 variants.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete agent-based multi-variant COVID-19 application.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Develops an agent-based HPV-transmission model and uses it to evaluate the statistical power of two post-vaccination study designs.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete agent-based HPV-transmission application supporting study-design evaluation.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses a microsimulation of MSM in San Francisco County to quantify long-term HIV effects of COVID-19 service disruptions and recovery policies.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete microsimulation application to HIV-service policy.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses a stochastic agent-based school-transmission model to compare screening and class-closure protocols under Omicron incidence conditions.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete agent-based SARS-CoV-2 school-policy application.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Augments and applies a validated microsimulation to compare integrated screening strategies for co-occurring conditions among people with HIV.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete microsimulation application to care strategies in an HIV cohort.
